prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
For transformer T-020, combine DGA diagnostics with thermal anomaly trends to decide whether to schedule immediate outage maintenance or defer with heightened monitoring.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should integrate DGA-based diagnosis and trend/anomaly evidence, make a binary maintenance decision (immediate outage vs deferred monitoring), and provide an actionable work-order or monitoring plan.

## Agent Plan
  Step 1: [fmsr] get_dga_record — Retrieve the most recent dissolved gas analysis (DGA) record for transformer T-020.
  Step 2: [fmsr] analyze_dga — Analyze the DGA record to determine the fault type using the IEC 60599 Rogers Ratio method. (depends on steps [1])
  Step 3: [iot] list_sensors — Retrieve the list of sensors available for transformer T-020.
  Step 4: [iot] none — Identify the thermal sensors (e.g., winding_temp_top_c) for transformer T-020. (depends on steps [3])
  Step 5: [tsfm] trend_analysis — Compute the trend (slope) of the thermal sensor readings over a time window for transformer T-020. (depends on steps [4])
  Step 6: [tsfm] none — Determine if the thermal anomaly trend indicates a potential issue requiring immediate maintenance. (depends on steps [5])
  Step 7: [wo] estimate_downtime — If maintenance is required, estimate the expected downtime for transformer T-020. (depends on steps [6])
  Step 8: [wo] create_work_order — Create a new maintenance work order for transformer T-020 if necessary. (depends on steps [7])

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)
[
  {
    "step": 1,
    "task": "Retrieve the most recent dissolved gas analysis (DGA) record for transformer T-020.",
    "server": "fmsr",
    "tool": "get_dga_record",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-020"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-020\",\n  \"sample_date\": \"2024-01-08T00:00:00\",\n  \"dissolved_h2_ppm\": 167.45,\n  \"dissolved_ch4_ppm\": 86.4,\n  \"dissolved_c2h2_ppm\": 28.71,\n  \"dissolved_c2h4_ppm\": 83.15,\n  \"dissolved_c2h6_ppm\": 39.55,\n  \"dissolved_co_ppm\": 634.2,\n  \"dissolved_co2_ppm\": 3546.15,\n  \"fault_label\": \"Arc discharge\",\n  \"source_dataset\": \"synthetic\"\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true,
    "verifier_decision": "continue",
    "verifier_reason": "DGA record retrieved successfully",
    "verifier_updated_focus": "",
    "retries_used": 0
  },
  {
    "step": 2,
    "task": "Analyze the DGA record to determine the fault type using the IEC 60599 Rogers Ratio method.",
    "server": "fmsr",
    "tool": "analyze_dga",
    "tool_args": {
      "h2": 167.45,
      "ch4": 86.4,
      "c2h2": 28.71,
      "c2h4": 83.15,
      "c2h6": 39.55,
      "transformer_id": "T-020"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"iec_code\": \"N\",\n  \"diagnosis\": \"Normal / Inconclusive\",\n  \"r1_ch4_h2\": 0.516,\n  \"r2_c2h2_c2h4\": 0.3453,\n  \"r3_c2h4_c2h6\": 2.1024,\n  \"input_gases\": {\n    \"h2_ppm\": 167.45,\n    \"ch4_ppm\": 86.4,\n    \"c2h2_ppm\": 28.71,\n    \"c2h4_ppm\": 83.15,\n    \"c2h6_ppm\": 39.55\n  },\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-020\"\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true,
    "verifier_decision": "continue",
    "verifier_reason": "DGA analysis completed successfully with normal/inconclusive result",
    "verifier_updated_focus": "",
    "retries_used": 0
  },
  {
    "step": 3,
    "task": "Retrieve the list of sensors available for transformer T-020.",
    "server": "iot",
    "tool": "list_sensors",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-020"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"load_current_a\",\n  \"unit\": \"A\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"oil_temp_c\",\n  \"unit\": \"\u00b0C\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"power_factor\",\n  \"unit\": \"\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"voltage_hv_kv\",\n  \"unit\": \"kV\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"voltage_lv_kv\",\n  \"unit\": \"kV\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"winding_temp_top_c\",\n  \"unit\": \"\u00b0C\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true,
    "verifier_decision": "continue",
    "verifier_reason": "Sensor list retrieved successfully",
    "verifier_updated_focus": "",
    "retries_used": 0
  },
  {
    "step": 4,
    "task": "Identify the thermal sensors (e.g., winding_temp_top_c) for transformer T-020.",
    "server": "iot",
    "tool": "none",
    "tool_args": {},
    "response": "List of thermal sensor IDs for transformer T-020.",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true,
    "verifier_decision": "continue",
    "verifier_reason": "Step completed successfully",
    "verifier_updated_focus": "",
    "retries_used": 0
  },
  {
    "step": 5,
    "task": "Compute the trend (slope) of the thermal sensor readings over a time window for transformer T-020.",
    "server": "tsfm",
    "tool": "trend_analysis",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-020",
      "sensor_id": "oil_temp_c"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-020\",\n  \"sensor_id\": \"oil_temp_c\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720,\n  \"start_time\": \"2024-01-01 00:00:00\",\n  \"end_time\": \"2024-01-30 23:00:00\",\n  \"mean_value\": 90.9004,\n  \"min_value\": 32.859,\n  \"max_value\": 146.779,\n  \"slope_per_day\": 0.047066,\n  \"direction\": \"stable\",\n  \"r_squared\": 0.0005\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true,
    "verifier_decision": "continue",
    "verifier_reason": "Thermal trend analysis completed successfully",
    "verifier_updated_focus": "",
    "retries_used": 0
  },
  {
    "step": 6,
    "task": "Determine if the thermal anomaly trend indicates a potential issue requiring immediate maintenance.",
    "server": "tsfm",
    "tool": "none",
    "tool_args": {},
    "response": "Decision to schedule immediate outage maintenance or defer with heightened monitoring for transformer T-020.",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true,
    "verifier_decision": "continue",
    "verifier_reason": "Thermal anomaly trend analysis completed successfully",
    "verifier_updated_focus": "",
    "retries_used": 0
  },
  {
    "step": 7,
    "task": "If maintenance is required, estimate the expected downtime for transformer T-020.",
    "server": "wo",
    "tool": "estimate_downtime",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-020",
      "severity": "high",
      "fault_type": "Arc discharge"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-020\",\n  \"severity\": \"high\",\n  \"fault_type\": \"Arc discharge\",\n  \"estimated_min_hours\": 16,\n  \"estimated_max_hours\": 48,\n  \"estimated_typical_hours\": 24,\n  \"source\": \"dataset_statistics_baseline\"\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true,
    "verifier_decision": "continue",
    "verifier_reason": "Downtime estimated successfully",
    "verifier_updated_focus": "",
    "retries_used": 0
  },
  {
    "step": 8,
    "task": "Create a new maintenance work order for transformer T-020 if necessary.",
    "server": "wo",
    "tool": "create_work_order",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-020",
      "issue_description": "Arc discharge fault detected with high severity",
      "priority": "high",
      "fault_type": "Arc discharge",
      "estimated_downtime_hours": 24
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"work_order_id\": \"WO-3BCD2156\",\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-020\",\n  \"issue_description\": \"Arc discharge fault detected with high severity\",\n  \"priority\": \"high\",\n  \"fault_type\": \"Arc discharge\",\n  \"status\": \"open\",\n  \"estimated_downtime_hours\": 24.0,\n  \"created_at\": \"2026-05-05T08:26:17.813242Z\",\n  \"assigned_technician\": null,\n  \"notes\": []\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true,
    "verifier_decision": "continue",
    "verifier_reason": "Maintenance work order created successfully",
    "verifier_updated_focus": "",
    "retries_used": 0
  }
]

## Agent Final Answer
Based on the DGA diagnostics indicating an "Arc discharge" fault and the thermal anomaly trend showing a stable direction with a slight increase, it is recommended to schedule immediate outage maintenance for transformer T-020. The expected downtime is estimated to be around 24 hours. A new maintenance work order (WO-3BCD2156) has been created to address the issue.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response:
{
    "task_completion": true,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true,
    "generalized_result_verification": false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true,
    "hallucinations": true,
    "suggestions": "Improve verification of results and ensure correct sequence of operations"
}
